actionUnits.condition: GameObject has a BoxCollider (no Rigidbody). Two MonoBehaviours attached: (1) SteamAudioSource (MonoBehaviour id=112451389, guid=59c3684b22f00604a97bb68037fcf4cd) configured with distanceAttenuation=1 (PhysicsBased), airAbsorption=1 (SimulationDefined), reflections/pathing disabled. (2) FireBasedAudioManager (MonoBehaviour id=112451392, guid=77f9a59041a2de446bf7704b5c31f103) with fireLimit=10, timeInterval=25. Awake() sets audioSource from GetComponent<AudioSource>() and shouldPlay=true. Update() will call audioSource.Play() once lastPlayed >= timeInterval while shouldPlay==true. There are no UnityEvents (m_Calls) and no public parameterless methods to invoke; this Trigger is used to wait long enough to exercise the automatic Update path and cause audio playback.
